PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { Write-Output "python: $\($py.Source\)"; python --version; python -c "import pptx; print\('python-pptx', pptx.__version__\)" } else { Write-Output "python not found" })

PowerShell(Get-Process POWERPNT -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize; if \(-not $?\) { } ; Write-Output "---"; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'POWERPNT|powerpnt' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "PowerPoint is running \(PID $\($_.Id\)\)" })
